themes.title: Core Security Features
themes.description: Implement essential security features to ensure data protection and compliance.

themes.title: User Access and Control
themes.description: Enhance user access management and control features for better governance.

themes.title: Branding and User Experience
themes.description: Improve user experience through branding and feedback mechanisms.

milestones.name: MVP Completion
milestones.description: Complete the MVP with critical security features.
milestones.success_criteria: MVP features are implemented and tested with no critical issues.

milestones.name: V1 Completion
milestones.description: Complete V1 with enhanced user access and control features.
milestones.success_criteria: V1 features are implemented and validated with user acceptance testing.

milestones.name: V2 Completion
milestones.description: Complete V2 with branding and user experience enhancements.
milestones.success_criteria: V2 features are implemented and positively received in user feedback.

sequencing.reason: V1 requires the completion of MVP features to build upon.
V2 enhancements depend on the successful implementation of V1 features.

mvp.goal: Establish foundational security features to protect user data.

v1.goal: Enhance user access and control mechanisms for better governance.

v2.goal: Improve branding and user experience through feedback and customization.
